products.name: EPS 200
products.descriptor: 200 kW integrated electric propulsion system for aviation and UAV

evidence.snippet: **MGM COMPRO** has a long tradition in the development of electric propulsion system units – from large series of systems ready for in-building to special tailor-made units, which change contemporary standards of electro mobility, e.g. in electric aircraft, vehicles, UAVs, UGVs, boats, military application, as well as many other fields where electrification is required.

products.name: EPS 400
products.descriptor: 400 kW integrated electric propulsion system for aviation and UAV

evidence.snippet: We are offering an EPS system with a delivery power of up to 400 kW. As high-power aviation applications require constant-speed propellers, MGM has developed a gearbox system with integrated functionality for single-action hydraulic control of propellers. This is combined with an extended redundancy system featuring multi-core and multi-winding electric motor structural arrangements.

products.name: HBCi series Controllers / Inverters / ESCs
products.descriptor: 3–400 kW BLDC/PMSM motor controller and ESC family for aviation and industrial applications

evidence.snippet:
Controllers | Inverters | ESCs
HBCi controllers represent state of the art technology of electric motor control. Ranging from 3kW up to 400kW, manufactured in many variants to completely fulfill customers’ needs. Unrivalled performance, power density ratio, redundancy, safety and innovation.

products.name: PTGS 400
products.descriptor: 400 kW planetary gearbox with integrated hydraulic constant-speed propeller governor

products.name: BMS-16Ai
products.descriptor: Active-balancing BMS for up to 224 cells in series, max 800 V, 130 g

products.name: BMS-16i
products.descriptor: Passive-balancing BMS for up to 128 cells in series, max 540 V, 305 g

products.name: BMS-8i
products.descriptor: Passive-balancing BMS for up to 64 cells in series, max 270 V, 150 g

products.name: ESS | Batteries
products.descriptor: Custom-built energy storage systems for aviation, UAV, and industrial applications

evidence.snippet:
ESS | Batteries
Energy Storage Systems designed according to the customers’ requirements with the most sophisticated technology focusing on the best use of energy, intelligent BMS, active & passive safety systems, effective mass production and certification.

products.name: Electric Motors (BLDC / PMSM)
products.descriptor: High-power-density BLDC/PMSM electric motor family for aviation and UAV propulsion

evidence.snippet:
Electric motors
The all new generation of MGM COMPRO electric motors (BLDC / PMSM) brings enhanced potential to electric applications. Based on the innovative topology of the motor magnetic field and winding design, we have achieved higher power density than ever before.

products.name: AAMCi series V2 800 semi-conductor contactor
products.descriptor: 500 A / 800 V DC semiconductor contactor with integrated anti-spark precharging

evidence.snippet:
### AAMCi – series V2 800 semi-conductor contactor
](https://mgm-compro.com/electronics-contactors/aamci-series-v2-800/)
(500 A | 800 V | 1000 A | 250 g)
AAMCi modules are designed for fast and safe connection/disconnection of loads (controller, battery, etc.) to 800V DC batteries. It provides charging capacities of the connected load and controls the Kilovac or Gigavac power contactors.

products.name: AAMCi series V2 400 semi-conductor contactor
products.descriptor: 500 A / 400 V DC semiconductor contactor with integrated anti-spark precharging

evidence.snippet:
### AAMCi – series V2 400 semi-conductor contactor
](https://mgm-compro.com/electronics-contactors/aamci-series-v2-400/)
(500 A | 400 V | 1000 A | 250 g)
AAMCi modules are designed for fast and safe connection/disconnection of loads (controller, battery, etc.) to 400V DC batteries. It provides charging capacities of the connected load and controls the Kilovac or Gigavac power contactors.

products.name: BMS-4i
products.descriptor: Passive-balancing BMS for up to 4 cells in series, max 70.4 V, 32 g

evidence.snippet:
### BMS-4i
](https://mgm-compro.com/bms-battery-management-systems/bms-4i/)
(4 cells | Passive | 70,4 V | 32 g)
BMS based on PASSIVE cell balancing, designed for use with Li-Pol, Li-Ion, LiFePO4 cells or any other cell type.

products.name: AACi 280120 semi-conductor contactor
products.descriptor: 280 A / 120 V DC semiconductor contactor with built-in anti-spark circuit

products.name: Industrial Chargers
products.descriptor: Precision battery charging systems from a few to hundreds of amperes

evidence.snippet:
Industrial Chargers
MGM COMPRO charging systems use an advanced algorithms to care for and extend the service lifespan of batteries. These systems ensure precision in charging with currents as low as a few Amperes up to hundreds or even more, if required.

products.name: Custom-Built Solutions
products.descriptor: Custom hardware and software development for specialty electronics and propulsion systems

evidence.snippet:
*   30 years of experience with development and manufacturing of specialty electronics, numerous successful projects, references from many happy customers, own manufacturing systems, as well as high expertise makes us the ideal partner for your project.
*   We specialize in development and manufacturing of custom-built HW and SW for numerous applications based on your needs and specifications.
